MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS
Off Calendar Feb-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ECONOMY FOODS, INC.'S MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS is to be heard at 9am on the Discovery Calendar. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR #12353

Plaintiff Economy Foods, Inc.'S Motion For Assignment Rights, , Restraining Order And Turnover Order; Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Feb-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty Matthew Barow of Cook Collection Attorney's (415-989-4730) appearing for plaintiff.
No appearance by defendant.

Tentative ruling is adopted - Plaintiff Economy Foods, Inc.'S Motion For Assignment Rights,Restraining Order And Turnover Order is granted in part and denied in part. If Plaintiff supplies a supplemental declaration stating that defendants have failed to pay any monies voluntarily, have been uncooperative as alleged in its Memorandum of Points and Authorities, and that the full amount remains due on the money judgement as provided by CCP 708.510(c)(3) the court will grant those portions of the motion seeking Assignment of Rights and Turnover CCP 699.040(a) only. Issuance of a Restraining Order is conditioned upon Plaintiff first providing an undertaking pursuant to CCP 708.520(b). Proposed order to be submitted in two days. Party stipulated to have matter decided by Judge Pro Tem. Rolando Pasquali Judge Pro Tem, not reported. =(302/JPT)
